query_title: Justice League: Crisis on Two Earths

recommendations.title: Justice League: Doom
recommendations.overview: An adaptation of Mark Waid's "Tower of Babel" story from the JLA comic. Vandal Savage steals confidential files Batman has compiled on the members of the Justice League, and learns all their weaknesses.

recommendations.title: Batman: Year One
recommendations.overview: A wealthy playboy named Bruce Wayne and a Chicago cop named Jim Gordon both return to Gotham City where their lives unexpectedly intersect.

recommendations.title: Justice League vs. Teen Titans
recommendations.overview: Robin is sent by Batman to work with the Teen Titans after his volatile behavior botches up a Justice League mission. The Titans must then step up to face Trigon after he possesses the League and threatens to conquer the world.

recommendations.title: Superman/Batman: Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: Batman discovers a mysterious teen-aged girl with superhuman powers and a connection to Superman. When the girl comes to the attention of Darkseid, the evil overlord of Apokolips, events take a decidedly dangerous turn.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Gods and Monsters
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In an alternate universe, very different versions of DC's Trinity fight against the government after they are framed for an embassy bombing.

recommendations.title: All Star Superman
recommendations.overview: Lex Luthor enacts his plan to rid the world of Superman, once and for all. Succeeding with solar radiation poisoning, the Man of Steel is slowly dying. With what little times remains, the Last Son of Krypton must confront the revealing of his secret

recommendations.title: Superman/Batman: Public Enemies
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Adventure, Drama, Action
recommendations.overview: United States President Lex Luthor uses the oncoming trajectory of a Kryptonite meteor to frame Superman and declare a $1 billion bounty on the heads of the Man of Steel and his ‘partner in crime’, Batman. Heroes and villains alike launch a relentles

recommendations.title: The Death of Superman
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Drama, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When a hulking monster arrives on Earth and begins a mindless rampage, the Justice League is quickly called in to stop it. But it soon becomes apparent that only Superman can stand against the monstrosity.

recommendations.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Test pilot Hal Jordan finds himself recruited as the newest member of the intergalactic police force, The Green Lantern Corps.

recommendations.title: Justice League vs. the Fatal Five
